ai_profile:
**Down The Rabbit Hole 2026 Festival Profile (July 03–05, 2026)**

Down The Rabbit Hole 2026 promises an eclectic and immersive musical journey, with 54 artists spanning a wide array of genres and styles. From the electronic beats of techno and house to the introspective sounds of folk and indie rock, the lineup captures the festival’s signature blend of cutting-edge and genre-defying acts. With electronic music leading the charge (12 acts), followed by indie rock (7 acts) and a vibrant mix of folk, hip-hop, and pop, the festival’s curation ensures there’s something for everyone. Six DJs also bring a dynamic edge to the experience, keeping the energy alive across its three-day run.

The festival boasts impressive diversity, showcasing artists from 20 countries, including the Netherlands, United Kingdom, United States, Ireland, France, and beyond. This global reach is complemented by a commitment to representation, with 13 female-fronted acts, 9 mixed-gender groups, and 13 performers identifying as people of color. These numbers reflect the festival’s ongoing efforts to create a platform that celebrates talent from a variety of cultural, gender, and ethnic backgrounds.

With an average artist rating of 7.78 and 96.3% of acts featured on Spotify, Down The Rabbit Hole 2026 is primed to deliver a high-quality experience. The festival’s lineup is a harmonious blend of established names and emerging voices, united by their ability to push boundaries and captivate audiences. Whether you’re drawn to the pulsing rhythms of electronic music or the storytelling charm of folk and indie, this year’s edition promises unforgettable moments for all.
